notes: Fixed solution_uniqueness_guard rubric failure by making tests more behavior-focused. Renamed test_stack_fallback_allocator_used to test_dynamic_allocation_pattern and made it accept any dynamic allocation pattern (stackFallback, .alloc, arena, dupeZ, dupe). Removed test_dynamic_string_duplication as its behavior is now covered by test_dynamic_allocation_pattern and test_allocation_and_cleanup_both_present. Updated eval_manifest.yaml to match new test names. NOP correctly fails (vulnerable buffer detected). Gold correctly passes all 13 tests.
